title: Protest action on R75 to Jansenville
description: JANSENVILLE NEWS - Motorists are advised to...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"JANSENVILLE NEWS - Motorists are advised to avoid the R75 towards Jansenville due to ongoing protest action, which started at about 05:00 this morning, Tuesday 17 June.","html":"JANSENVILLE NEWS - Motorists are advised to avoid the R75 towards Jansenville due to ongoing protest action, which started at about 05:00 this morning, Tuesday 17 June."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Trucks have been used to block the R75 at both entrances to town, as well as the R339 to Klipplaat, and the protesters have taken the keys."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Authorities are working to resolve the situation.","html":"Authorities are working to resolve the situation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The police and traffic officers are on-site, monitoring the situation and diverting traffic to alternative routes.","html":"The police and traffic officers are on-site, monitoring the situation and diverting traffic to alternative routes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Some residents indicated that the protest action is the result of some discontent with the progress of the investigation into the murder of a 53-year-old Jansenville resident, Piet Tieman, whose body was found in town with gunshot wounds on 18 May.","html":"Some residents indicated that the protest action is the result of some discontent with the progress of the investigation into the murder of a 53-year-old Jansenville resident, Piet Tieman, whose body was found in town with gunshot wounds on 18 May."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, this could not be confirmed, since, according to Captain Marius McCarthy, the Sarah Baartman District’s police spokesperson, they still have to establish why the roads have been blocked.","html":"However, this could not be confirmed, since, according to Captain Marius McCarthy, the Sarah Baartman District’s police spokesperson, they still have to establish why the roads have been blocked."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Protest action on R75 to Jansenville
